zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Rockwood於大約1402年出生在英國諾福爾可霍爾特時，她的父親Nathanial Rockwood15歲，母親Joanna Ellis15歲。她於1417年與Sir John Gresham The Younger在英國英格蘭諾福爾可朗 斯特拉頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1465年在英國英格蘭諾福爾可霍爾特享年64歲。

nameMeanings.name: Rockwood
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English rok(e) ‘rook’ + wod(e) ‘wood’ (Old English hrōc, wudu). The name may be topographic, denoting someone who lived by a wood inhabited by rooks, or habitational, for someone from any of several minor places so named, such as Rookwood Hall in Abbess Roding (Essex), Rook Wood in Finchingfield (Essex), or Rockwood in East Grinstead (Sussex).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Rockwood was born about 1402, in Holt, Norfolk, England, her father, Nathanial Rockwood, was 15 and her mother, Joanna Ellis, was 15. She married Sir John Gresham The Younger in 1417, in Long Stratton, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1465, in Holt, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 64.

Elle est décédée en 1465, à Holt, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 64 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Rockwoodが約1402年にイギリスノーフォルクホルトで生まれた時，父Nathanial Rockwoodは15歳，母Joanna Ellisは15歳であった。1417年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクロング ストラットオンでSir John Gresham The Youngerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1465年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクホルトで64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Rockwood(이)가 대략 1402년 영국 노르폴크 홀트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Nathanial Rockwood(은)는 15세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joanna Ellis(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 1417년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 론그 스트래턴에서 Sir John Gresham The Younger(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1465년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 홀트에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Rockwood родилась около 1402 г. в местности холт, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Nathanial Rockwood было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Joanna Ellis, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Gresham The Younger в 1417 г. в местности лонг страттон, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1465 г. в местности холт, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 64 лет.
